task: Go from Chiosco Corsica to Chiosco Oasi.
reward: Complete the segment to earn yourself an exclusive digital badge

name: Ceres Lager | Di corsa neanche al bar #2
description: The challenge where the goal is to go from one bar to another, with no rush.
task: Go from Chiosco Oasi to Chiosco Falcone.
reward: Complete the segment to earn yourself an exclusive digital badge

name: Ceres Lager | Di corsa neanche al bar #3
description: The challenge where the goal is to go from one bar to another, with no rush.
task: Go from Dandy to Ai Bagnoli.
reward: Complete the segment to earn yourself an exclusive digital badge

name: Ceres Lager | Di corsa neanche al bar #4
description: The challenge where the goal is to go from one bar to another, with no rush.
task: Go from Ai Bagnoli to Dainotti's.
reward: Complete the segment to earn yourself an exclusive digital badge

name: Celsius x Aston Martin F1® Team Run Challenge - Montreal
description: Run the most Montreal segments for a chance to win Aston Martin F1® Team swag and 1YR of CELSIUS.
reward: Complete the segment the most times for a chance to win 1 year’s supply of CELSIUS and exclusive co-branded swag.

name: Norauto - With you every step of the way
description: Win your VIP weekend for the arrival of the Tour de France with Norauto!
time: May 20, 2026 to Jun 2, 2026  —  4 days until start
reward: An exclusive badge and a chance to win a VIP weekend in Paris or a Norauto E-FIT 300-2 bike rack.

name: The POC Grand Tour Challenge
description: Ride 153 km. Win a Škoda VIP cycling experience at the Tour de France
time: May 23, 2026 to May 31, 2026  —  7 days until start
reward: Log 153 km, earn 20% off and enter to win a signed EF helmet or a Škoda VIP cycling experience at the TDF.

name: HOKA: THE SPEEDGOAT QUEST — BERLIN
description: Complete the segment to unlock exclusive HOKA rewards.
time: May 23, 2026 to May 24, 2026  —  7 days until start
reward: Earn your exclusive HOKA Speedgoat Quest digital badge and the chance to win exclusive rewards.

name: On Squad Race Barcelona Challenge
description: Show what real energy looks like. Run the segment to earn a digital badge.
reward: Complete the segment to earn the official On Squad Race Barcelona digital badge.

name: Smoothie King Hydration Challenge
description: Move. Hydrate. Earn a BOGO Smoothie
time: May 18, 2026 to Jun 15, 2026  —  2 days until start
reward: Earn a BOGO smoothie! Complete the challenge, submit the form, and claim your exclusive promo code.

name: Starbucks® Coffee & Protein Level Up
description: Walk or run at least 22 minutes a day for any 10 days or more for a chance to win.
time: May 21, 2026 to Jun 18, 2026  —  5 days until start
task: Complete 22 minutes of activity on 10 separate days
reward: Complete the challenge for a chance to win a limited-edition Starbucks™ Weighted Vest.
